alerts.header: UPDATE: Stop 51971 Eastbound E 49 Ave @ Main St is temporarily closed from Mon May 4 through Fri May 15 due to construction.
Stop 60386 Eastbound W 41 Ave @ East Blvd is temporarily closed beginning Monday May 4. Please use new stop 60548 near Maple St.
Stop 62057 Westbound W 49th Ave @ Columbia St is temporarily closed through Fri May 15 due to construction.

Stop 51987 Eastbound E 49 Ave @ Elliott St is temporarily closed from Tue May 12 through Fri May 22 due to construction. 430 bus will be picking up passengers at the next stop #51988 EB 49 Ave and Vivian St.
Stop 52047 Westbound W 49 Ave @ Larch St is temporarily closed until end of service on May 20 due to construction.

UPDATE: 49 UBC detour from Thur May 7 to Fri May 15 from 7:30 PM to 5:30 AM nightly. Regular route to 49 Ave and Main St then via Main St, 41 Ave, Cambie St, 49 Ave, resume regular route due to construction.
